channel.title: Taiwan on zhouyang — The 25th Frame
channel.description: Recent content in Taiwan on zhouyang — The 25th Frame

item.title: Hong Shao Niu Rou Mian: The Braised Beef Noodle Soup That Knows What Time Tastes Like
item.description: I was 23, fresh out of Fudan and three months into my first job at Microsoft’s Shanghai office. December. The kind of damp Shanghai cold that seeps through wool and lodges in your bones like a bad tenant. I’d just pulled a sixteen-hour shift debugging a storage-layer outage that took down half of Asia-Pacific, and at 2am the only thing open within walking distance was a beef noodle shop on Ziyun Road with a flickering neon sign and six plastic stools.
